name: Creamy Blender Chocolate Frosting
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut chocolate into small pieces.
2. Put all of the ingredients into a blender.
3. Cover and blend at low speed until larger pieces are chopped.
4. Stir manually.
5. Blend at high speed until frosting becomes thick and creamy.
6. This frosting is absolutely delicious. Makes 3 cups frosting.
Recipe by: Mrs. Norman Saurage III Found in: River Road Recipes II Shared by: Scott Ward I
